title: Scope D T-D6: AGENTS.md rule text + fab install re-sync + memory updates
description: Update the .fabric/AGENTS.md second bullet to reflect new auto-heal contract, re-run `fab install` to propagate to all three managed blocks (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc), and update the corresponding memory entry. Verify byte-equality across the three ends after install.

files.change: Change `- **`.fabric/agents.meta.json` 严禁手动编辑**:baseline 变更只能通过 `fabric doctor --fix` 接受。` to `- **`.fabric/agents.meta.json` 严禁手动编辑**;engine 会自动同步派生状态,显式 reconcile 跑 `fab doctor --fix`。`

files.target: managed blocks at all three client ends
files.change: Run `fab install` to propagate .fabric/AGENTS.md content into the three managed blocks. Verify byte-equality post-install: `diff <(awk '/<fabric-managed>/,/<\/fabric-managed>/' CLAUDE.md) <(awk '/<fabric-managed>/,/<\/fabric-managed>/' AGENTS.md)` returns empty.

files.target: section noting the AGENTS.md initial content
files.change: Update the section that quotes the second bullet text to reflect the new wording; or add a marginalia note that rc.22 amended the bullet to drop the 'baseline 变更只能通过 doctor --fix' phrasing.

Replace the rc.22-ledger-rotation entry with a 'rc.22 SHIPPED' entry covering all 5 scopes (A ledger rotation, B baseline filename, C tags drop, D auto-heal, E reconcile fix). Mark in T9 task workflow that this update happens AFTER rc.22 actually ships (post-tag, post-CI green).

implementation: Run `fab install` (from repo root) and observe propagation
Manually diff the three managed blocks to confirm byte-equality
Update project_rc19_bootstrap_consolidation.md to note the new wording
Defer MEMORY.md SHIPPED-entry update until T8/T9 confirm rc.22 lands (i.e., document in T9 post-release checklist; do NOT update MEMORY.md until then)
Run snapshot drift test if any (`pnpm --filter @fabric/cli test bootstrap-snapshot` etc.) to verify the install produces stable output

reference.pattern: Existing .fabric/AGENTS.md cite-policy section + fab install propagation flow
reference.examples: rc.20 cite-policy update is the precedent — same workflow (edit source + fab install + diff verify)

criteria: .fabric/AGENTS.md second bullet uses new wording (no `baseline 变更只能通过 doctor --fix` phrase)
CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md (repo root), .cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc managed blocks are byte-equal after `fab install`
Bootstrap snapshot test passes (if such test exists)
MEMORY.md update deferred to T9 post-release (documented in task description, not done here)

rationale.chosen_approach: Single source edit (.fabric/AGENTS.md) + fab install propagation — established pattern
alternatives_considered: Manually edit all 3 ends (违反 fab install 设计)
Skip the rule text update (leaves docs stale)
decision_factors: Documentation accuracy matters for downstream users
rationale.tradeoffs: MEMORY.md update has to happen post-ship (T9), small coordination cost

manual_checks: Run `fab install` and inspect output for the three target paths
Diff managed blocks across the three ends — must be byte-equal
success_metrics: Bootstrap snapshot test (if any) stays green
